name: Codeception
description: Full-stack PHP testing framework supporting unit, functional, acceptance and API tests with a BDD-style DSL and first-class WebDriver module.

seo.title: Codeception — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Codeception: Full-stack PHP testing framework supporting unit, functional, acceptance and API tests with a BDD-style DSL and first-class WebDriver module.

when_to_use: Full PHP test stack: unit, functional, acceptance in one tool
WebDriver-based acceptance tests for Laravel or Symfony
REST API testing with JSON schema validation
BDD-style Gherkin scenarios without extra runners

pros: Unit, functional, acceptance and API under one tool
Readable BDD-style DSL for action-driven tests
First-class WebDriver module for browser coverage
cons: Too many layers for small codebases
Documentation lags the actual feature set
Slower than plain PHPUnit for unit tests
review.verdict: A Swiss-army PHP test framework that shines on full stacks but overwhelms simple library projects.
review.best_for: PHP monoliths needing unit, API and browser tests in one consistent toolchain
review.not_for: Small libraries happy with plain PHPUnit and a Composer script
